iterationHistory.action: Fixed 4 gaps (GAP-02 through GAP-05), GAP-01 was a non-gap

gaps.description: PH-01 master plan estimates 8 stories; the phase plan contains exactly 8 stories. This is within tolerance, but worth confirming the estimate was accurate.
gaps.missingRequirement: No gap — story count matches exactly (8 estimated, 8 delivered). Reporting for completeness.

gaps.description: NFR-02 (response time: <5s for init, <2s for iteration calls) is only tested in PH-04 integration tests (PH04-US03-AC03 covers init <5s) but the <2s constraint for iteration calls has no explicit test coverage.
gaps.missingRequirement: NFR-02 iteration call performance (<2 seconds) has no corresponding acceptance criterion.
gaps.resolution: FIXED: Added PH04-US03-AC09 for iteration call <2s performance test.

gaps.description: REQ-16 specifies that when on Claude Code Max, projectedIterationCostUsd should reflect $0 for Max users 'with a note that coordinator API calls would cost more'.
gaps.missingRequirement: The note/annotation distinguishing $0 Max-user cost from coordinator API call cost is not explicitly tested.
gaps.resolution: FIXED: Added PH02-US03-AC05 for Max-user $0 cost note in output.

gaps.description: SC-09 grep for callClaude only covers 4 specific files, not the full dependency chain.
gaps.missingRequirement: PH04-US03-AC02's grep scope is narrower than SC-09's full dependency chain requirement.
gaps.resolution: FIXED: Updated PH04-US03-AC02 grep to use recursive search excluding only test files.

gaps.description: REQ-03 plateau detection boundary case previousScores=[0.3, 0.5, 0.5] not explicitly tested.
gaps.missingRequirement: The improving-then-plateauing boundary case is not named in PH01-US06 ACs.
gaps.resolution: FIXED: Added PH01-US06-AC08 for the [0.3, 0.5, 0.5] boundary case.

summary: Zero CRITICAL gaps. Zero MAJOR gaps. 5 MINOR gaps found — 1 non-gap (story count match), 4 fixed by adding targeted ACs. All 16 REQs, 9 SCs, and 6 NFRs have coverage across the combined phase plans.
